title: Misatos Father
wikitext:
[]: Misato's Father?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Aug 14, 2020 2:22 pm Saw this on Twitter. The account is just an Evangelion fan in Japan but the book looks pretty official. Is this elaborate fanart or for some Eva spinoff like a game or something? Anyone have clues? tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Misato's Father?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 14, 2020 3:18 pm It's just the art book for Detective Evangelion. Half of Dr. Katsuragi's face is shown in both NGE and NTE, and he's much younger and doesn't look like a discount bin Fuyutsuki.

[]: Re: Misato's Father?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Aug 14, 2020 3:33 pm Detective Evangelion? Wow. There's so much Eva nonsense I don't know or care about. I hope Detective Pikachu is involved.

[]: Re: Misato's Father?             Quote Post by Melkor » Fri Aug 14, 2020 4:24 pm What's that weird suit he's wearing in the picture on the right? Some kind of plug suit?

[]: Re: Misato's Father?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 14, 2020 6:17 pm He turns into an Angel (or the game's version of the Angels, which is written with different kanji but still pronounced shito ) called "Katsuragiman".

[]: Re: Misato's Father?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 16, 2020 9:29 am Wow. I uh....I suppose that's one reason I never did check out Detective Evangelion: Sounded a bit too wild even for Eva standards

[]: Re: Misato's Father?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Aug 16, 2020 4:29 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Wow. I uh....I suppose that's one reason I never did check out Detective Evangelion: Sounded a bit too wild even for Eva standards
